name: Passageway
description:
-This is a long, cobweb covered passage, many years of dust are settled on
the antiques, walls and floors...The passage leads from the stairwell, to
the entrance of the Secret Tunnel of the Ocean Tower...As you travel through
the passageway there are many doors to rooms on the right of you, which
behind these closed doors are the private quarters of the Kings and Queens of
Castle of Desire...
